description: A meaningful grouping of words that expresses a thought or feeling, forming a single unit within a larger expression. It is the first step in weaving words into a tapestry of meaning.
rationale: The generative breath 'pho' gives life to words, like wind animating still leaves into dance. This creative force settles into 'ni', the personal essence that makes each phrase unique - not just words strung together but meaning given particular form. Together they capture how phrases work: breath organizing itself into patterns that carry more than their parts, the way a melody is more than individual notes.
